creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 255853
Patch for xseticon

Given the size of the project instead of patching Makefile, pulling in gmake and pkgconfig just add small do-build section instead.

While at it, define LICENSE_FILE and do some minor changes in port Makefile to follow layout closer to the tree in general.

Poudriere testport ok 13.4-RELEASE (amd64), 14.2-RELEASE (amd64)
